name: Menthol
summary: Menthol is a monoterpene associated with peppermint. Evidence level: moderate.
description: Menthol can relax airway and smooth muscle signaling by modulating ion channels and activating temperature-sensing TRPM8, influencing perceived airflow and discomfort.
safetyNotes: Generally safe; irritation at high doses
dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
typical_dosage: standardized extract or essential-oil-free preparation when oral use is intended
